overview.description: The BondBloxx Bloomberg Two Year Target Duration US Treasury ETF (XTWO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is passively managed to invest in a portfolio of US Treasury securities with a target duration of two years. XTWO was launched on Sep 13, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Treasury 2 Year Target Duration Index
